content: The 2024–2025 SOTA push to optimize active learning agent memory can be reframed as treating biological/architectural long-term memory itself as an embedded active learning agent, rather than a passive storage layer for active learning agents. This means memory does not just store data queried by an active learning policy—it proactively curates, forgets, and requests new data to improve its own utility for the agent over time.
source_topics: memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
